title: OFSI General licence INT/2025/5635700
body: " General licence INT/2025/5635700 General licence NT/2025/5635700 Publication notice   On 10 January 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/5635700 under regulation 64 of the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (“the Russia Regulations”) which allows for the continuation of business operations with the Relevant Subsidiary to the extent they are in relation to the Exempt Projects. "
